steps.title: Set up
steps.content: $W(x) = 4x + 80$, where $x$ is the number of plants. The two tasks are watering plants and mowing grass.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: The term $4x$ grows with the number of plants, so it represents watering. The constant 80 does not change with $x$, so it represents mowing — a fixed-time task regardless of plant count.
